description: Execute a camera replacement workflow for the 'Server Room' location where 'Server Room (Faulty)' is replaced by 'New_Camera_Detected_0042'. Transfer the recording schedule configuration (fps, quality, etc.) from the faulty camera to the new one. Rename 'Server Room (Faulty)' to 'Server Room (Decommissioned)' and disable it. Rename 'New_Camera_Detected_0042' to 'Server Room Camera' and ensure it is enabled. Document the swap in a JSON maintenance log at /home/ga/maintenance_report.json. Access the system via Nx Witness REST API (https://localhost:7001, admin/Admin1234!) or the Web Admin interface.
